segments.text: MARTHA: Hi Alex. It's Martha Clines here.
segments.translation: 玛莎：嗨，亚历克斯。我是玛莎·克莱恩斯。

segments.text: James White gave me your number.
segments.translation: 詹姆斯·怀特给了我你的号码。

segments.text: I hope you don't mind me calling you.
segments.translation: 希望你不会介意我打电话给你。

segments.text: ALEX: Of course not. How are you, Martha?
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：当然不会。最近怎么样，玛莎？

segments.text: MARTHA: Good thanks. I'm ringing because I need a bit of advice.
segments.translation: 玛莎：近来还不错，谢谢。我给你打电话是因为我需要一些建议。

segments.text: ALEX: Oh yeah. What about?
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：没问题。关于什么呢？

segments.text: MARTHA: The training you did at JPNW a few years ago.
segments.translation: 玛莎：听说几年前你在JPNW参加过培训。

segments.text: I'm applying for the same thing.
segments.translation: 我现在也在申请这个。

segments.text: ALEX: Oh right. Yes, I did mine in 2014.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：对，是的。我在2014年参加了培训。

segments.text: Best thing I ever did.
segments.translation: 那是我做过的最好的事情。

segments.text: I'm still working there.
segments.translation: 并且我现在还在那里工作。

segments.text: MARTHA: Really?What are you doing?
segments.translation: 玛莎：真的吗？你在做什么？

segments.text: ALEX: Well, now I work in the customer services department but I did my initial training in Finance.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：我现在在客户服务部工作，但最初的培训是关于财务方面的。

segments.text: I stayed there for the first two years and then moved to where I am now.
segments.translation: 前两年我在财务部工作，然后变动到了现在的部门。

segments.text: MARTHA: That's the same department I'm applying for.
segments.translation: 玛莎：我现在申请的是同一部门。

segments.text: Did you enjoy it?
segments.translation: 你喜欢这个部门吗？

segments.text: ALEX: I was pretty nervous to begin with.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：刚开始的时候，我非常紧张。

segments.text: I didn't do well in my exams at school and I was really worried because I failed Maths.
segments.translation: 我在学校的考试中表现不佳，因为我的数学考试不及格，所以我真的很担心。

segments.text: But it didn't actually matter because I did lots of courses on the job.
segments.translation: 但实际上那并不重要，因为我在工作上做了很多功课。

segments.text: MARTHA: Did you get a diploma at the end of your trainee period?
segments.translation: 玛莎：你在实习期满时获得证书了吗？

segments.text: I'm hoping to do the one in business skills.
segments.translation: 我希望参加商业方面的培训。

segments.text: ALEX: Yes. That sounds good.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：是的。听起来不错呢。

segments.text: I took the one on IT skills but I wish I'd done that one instead.
segments.translation: 我选了IT技术的那一门，但真希望我当时选了（商业）那一门。

segments.text: MARTHA: OK, that's good to know.
segments.translation: 玛莎：好的，很高兴了解到这些。

segments.text: What about the other trainees?
segments.translation: 其他学员呢？

segments.text: How did you get on with them?
segments.translation: 你和他们相处的怎么样？

segments.text: ALEX: There were about 20 of us who started at the same time and we were all around the same age - I was 18 and there was only one person younger than me, who was 17.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：我们大约20个人同时开始培训，我们都在同一个年龄段内——我18岁，只有一个比我小的人，17岁。

segments.text: The rest were between 18 and 20..
segments.translation: 其余的人在18到20岁之间。

segments.text: I made some good friends
segments.translation: 我交到了一些好朋友。

segments.text: MARTHA: I've heard lots of good things about the training at JPNW.
segments.translation: 玛莎：我听说JPNW的培训真的很不错。

segments.text: It seems like there are a lot of opportunities there.
segments.translation: 似乎那里会有很多机会。

segments.text: ALEX: Yeah, definitely. Because of its size you can work in loads of different areas within the organisation.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：当然是的。由于它的规模（很大），你可以在公司内部不同区域工作。

segments.text: MARTHA: What about pay?
segments.translation: 玛莎：薪水怎么样？

segments.text: I know you get a lower minimum wage than regular employees.
segments.translation: 我知道你的最低薪水比正式员工要低。

segments.text: ALEX: That's right - which isn't great.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：的确——这一点不是很好。

segments.text: But you get the same number of days' holiday as everyone else.
segments.translation: 但是，你能获得与其他人一样的假期天数。

segments.text: And the pay goes up massively if they offer you a job at the end of the training period.
segments.translation: 如果他们在培训期结束时为你提供工作，那么工资就会大幅增加。

segments.text: MARTHA: Yeah, but I'm not doing it for the money - it's the experience I think will be really useful.
segments.translation: 玛莎：明白了，但是我不是为了钱才加入的——我认为真正有用的东西是经验。

segments.text: Everyone says by the end of the year you gain so much confidence.
segments.translation: 大家都说这一年结束时你就会变得非常自信。

segments.text: ALEX: You're right. That's the most useful part about it.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：没错，是这样的。这就是最有用的地方。

segments.text: There's a lot of variety too.
segments.translation: 而且它有多样性。

segments.text: You're given lots of different things to do.
segments.translation: 你会有很多不同的任务要做。

segments.text: I enjoyed it all - I didn't even mind the studying.
segments.translation: 我很喜欢这些——我也不介意学习（的过程）。

segments.text: MARTHA: Do you have to spend any time in college?
segments.translation: 玛莎：那你必须在学校待一段时间吗？

segments.text: ALEX: Yes, one day each month.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：是的，每个月一天。

segments.text: So you get lots of support from both your tutor and your manager.
segments.translation: 所以你能得到来自导师和经理双方面的支持。

segments.text: MARTHA: That's good.
segments.translation: 玛莎：很棒。

segments.text: And the company is easy to get to, isn't it?
segments.translation: 公司（交通）方便吗？

segments.text: ALEX: Yes, it's very close to the train station so the location's a real advantage.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：是的，它离火车站很近，所以这个位置真的很有优势。

segments.text: ALEX: Have you got a date for your interview yet?
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：你的面试日期确定了吗？

segments.text: MARTHA: Yes, it's on the 23rd of this month.
segments.translation: 玛莎：确定了，这个月的23日。

segments.text: ALEX: So long as you're well prepared there's nothing to worry about.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：只要你做好充分的准备，就没什么可担心的了。

segments.text: Everyone's very friendly.
segments.translation: 每个人都非常友好。

segments.text: MARTHA: I am not sure what I should wear.
segments.translation: 玛莎：我不知道应该穿什么。

segments.text: What do you think?
segments.translation: 你觉得呢？

segments.text: ALEX: Nothing too casual - like jeans, for example.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：不要过于随意，例如牛仔裤。

segments.text: If you've got a nice jacket, wear that with a skirt or trousers.
segments.translation: 如果你有一件好看的夹克，搭配裙子或裤子就很不错。

segments.text: MARTHA: OK. Thanks. Any other tips?
segments.translation: 玛莎：好的。谢谢你。还有其他建议吗？

segments.text: ALEX: Erm, well I know it's really obvious but arrive in plenty of time.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：嗯，显然你要到早一些。

segments.text: They hate people who are late.
segments.translation: 他们讨厌迟到的人。

segments.text: So make sure you know exactly where you have to get to.
segments.translation: 所以一定要知道你具体去哪儿。

segments.text: And one other useful piece of advice my manager told me before I had the interview for this job - is to smile.
segments.translation: 我的经理在面试前告诉我的另一条有用的建议是——微笑。

segments.text: Even if you feel terrified.
segments.translation: 即使你感到害怕。

segments.text: It makes people respond better to you.
segments.translation: 但是这会让人们给你更好的回应。

segments.text: MARTHA: I'll have to practise doing that in the mirror!
segments.translation: 玛莎：我会在镜子里练习这样做的！

segments.text: ALEX: Yeah - well, good luck.
segments.translation: 亚历克斯：没错——祝你好运。

segments.text: Let me know if you need any more information.
segments.translation: 如果你需要更多信息，联系我。

segments.text: MARTHA: Thanks very much.
segments.translation: 玛莎：非常感谢。
